items.text: 因此，在虚幻引擎中只有三种不同的方法来制作角色的动画。 So there's only three different ways to animate a character inside of Unreal Engine. 我们有动画资产，这一点刚才已经说过了。 We have animation assets, which we've just talked about. 这些就是我们可以在 Sequencer 中应用到角色的动画片段。 These are our clips of animation that we can apply to our characters inside of Sequencer. 我们有动画蓝图和控制装置。 We have animation blueprints and we have control rig. 下面，让我们逐一深入探讨。 So let's dive deeper on each of these. 因此，动画资产是在另一个软件中创建的，然后导入到虚幻中。 So animation assets are created in another software and imported into Unreal. 这些都不是以任何方式在虚幻中创建的。 These are not created inside of Unreal in any way. 这些都与导入时的骨架相关联。 And these are linked to a skeleton on import. 因此，它们必须有匹配的钻机结构、相同的骨骼以及每块骨骼的命名 So they have to have a matching rig structure, the same bones, and naming of each of those bones 以便您在导入动画时为它们分配正确的骨骼。 for you to assign the right skeleton to them when you're importing your animations. 这就是动画编辑器的样子。 So this is what the animation editor looks like. 我们可以用它在编辑器内预览动画资产。 And we can use this to preview animation assets inside of the editor. 这样我们就可以预览动画了。 So we can preview animations. 我们可以更改预览动画的骨骼网格。 We can change the skeletal mesh that we're previewing the animation on. 在右侧的列表中，所有动画都与同一个骨架相关联。 And we have this list on the right, which has every animation associated to that same skeleton. 就是这样。 And that's it. 实际上，你并不能在动画编辑器中创建任何动画，尤其是视觉特效。 You do not actually create any animations inside of the animation editor, especially for VFX. 你可以看到顶部有一个创建资产的选项，但这有点误导。 You can see there is this option to create assets at the top, but this is a little bit misleading. 这实际上只是为了在游戏中创造一些额外的东西，而不是为了视觉效果。 This is really just to create some additional things for gameplay, but not for visual effects. 因此，不要对此感到困惑。 So don't get confused by this. 这始终取决于您导入到虚幻中的动画。 It's always dependent on the animation you import into Unreal. 而修改动画的唯一方法就是在 Sequencer 中进行。 And the only way we can modify our animation is within Sequencer. 几分钟后，我们就会告诉你怎么做。 And we'll show you how in just a few minutes. 这就是动画资产。 So that's animation assets. 下一种动画资产是动画蓝图。 And the next type of animation asset is an animation blueprint. 重复我之前说过的话，你不能把它用于视觉特效或渲染，只能用于游戏。 And to repeat what I said before, you do not use this for VFX or rendering, only for gameplay. 这些都是简单的逻辑树和状态机，它们将 These are simple logic trees and state machines that will 调整游戏过程中角色的动画效果。 adjust how the characters are animated during gameplay. 他们将使用动画资产，并决定使用哪个动画是正确的。 They'll use animation assets and decide which animation is the right one to use. 但我们在任何情况下都不会使用这种方法。 But we do not use this under any circumstances. 没有理由这样做。 There's just no reason to. 它只是没有达到我们正在做的离线渲染的目的。 It just isn't serving the purpose of offline rendering like we're doing. 所以，刚开始学的时候，根本不用担心学不会。 So don't even worry about learning this whatsoever when you're first getting started. 最后是 Control Rig。 And lastly is Control Rig. 因此，这是一个附加的装配系统，可用于在游戏过程中操纵动画。 So this is an add-on rigging system that can be used to manipulate animations during gameplay. 我们可以将其用于视觉特效和电影制作，在 Sequencer 中为角色制作动画。 And we can use this for VFX and filmmaking to animate our characters inside of Sequencer. 所以这是一个在虚幻中创建的装配系统。 So it's a rigging system created inside of Unreal. 作为控制装备资产的一部分创建的所有装备 All of the rigs that you're creating as a part of a Control Rig asset 必须在虚幻系统内制作，因为它是一个专有系统。 have to be made inside of Unreal because it's a proprietary system. 我们有一个节点图，就像你在蓝图中看到的那样。 And we have a node graph like you'll see with blueprints. 您将在该系统中设置自定义骨骼 You'll go through and set up a custom bone inside of this system 并用它来驱动控制台的逻辑。 and use that to drive the logic of the Control Rig. 为了避免混淆，这需要一个现有的钻机。 And just so it's not confusing, this requires an existing rig. 这并不是要创建一个新的钻机。 This is not to create a new rig. 除此之外还有 This is on top of. 因此，当我说附加系统时，这实际上是对现有装备的操纵 So when I said an add-on system, this really is manipulating that existing rig 的动画。 that already has existing animations on top of it. 需要提醒的是，这可能只适合高级用户。 And just a word of caution, I would say this is probably just for advanced users only. 如果您刚刚开始学习，不必担心创建这样的文件。 If you're just learning, don't worry about creating one of these. 这真是一个大兔子洞，一定会让你陷入其中 It's a really big rabbit hole that will definitely get you stuck 如果您不清楚虚幻内部其他系统是如何工作的，请访问 "虚幻"。 if you're not sure about how the other systems work inside of Unreal. 因此，我不会在以后才担心这个问题。 So I wouldn't worry about this until later on. 因此，对于视觉特效和电影制作来说，我们需要从中获取的两样东西就是动画资产、 So for VFX and filmmaking, the two things we need to take out of this are animation assets, 我们将从其他软件中导入的资产 which are the assets that we'll import from another software 我们可以在 Sequencer 中回放、串联。 and we can play back, string together inside of Sequencer. 然后是 Control Rig，我们在 "武士之战 "项目中就使用了它。 And then there's Control Rig, which that's what we used on the War of Being Samurai project. 我们使用 Control Rig 来修改动作捕捉动画 And we use Control Rig to modify the motion capture animation 并在虚幻引擎中完成最后一步动作捕捉清理。 and do that last step of motion capture cleanup all inside of Unreal Engine. 因此，我还是只想在这里概述一下工作流程，不会太深入、 So I still just want to overview the workflow here and not go too in-depth, 但我想向你展示如何在 Sequencer 中使用 Control Rig。 but I want to show you how you use Control Rig inside of Sequencer. 控制装配 "的工作方式是导入动画、 So the way Control Rig works is you'll have your imported animations, 无论您使用的是一个夹子还是多个夹子。 whether you have one single clip or several strung together. 然后右键单击骨骼网格。 And then you want to right-click on your skeletal mesh. 如果您的角色连接了控制装备、 And if you have a Control Rig linked to your character, 你需要导航到 "烘焙 "到 "控制装配"，然后选择 "控制装配 "资产。 you'll want to navigate down to Bake to Control Rig and select that Control Rig asset. 这将为我们提供一些设置。 And this will give us some settings. 不幸的是，这种工作方式会在每一帧上创建一个关键帧。 Now, unfortunately, the way this works is it's going to create a keyframe on every single frame. 这很像动作捕捉。 This is very much like motion capture. 所以，这取决于你。 So it's up to you. 我会测试减少按键对动画的影响。 I would test out how this reduce keys affects your animation. 但如果你要使用它，0.1 是个不错的起始值。 But if you're going to use it, this is a pretty good value of 0.1 to start with. 它将为每个轨道烘焙出一个关键帧 What it's going to do is it's going to bake out a keyframe for every single track 以及场景中的每个控件。 and every single control in your scene. 因此，如果我退出游戏模式，然后点击 "控制钻机 "资产下方、 So if I get out of game mode here and I click underneath this Control Rig asset, 就会开始选择控制装备内的不同骨骼。 it will start to select the different bones inside of our Control Rig. 现在，我们的场景中还没有这种东西。 Now, this didn't exist in our scene before. 它现在只能通过烘焙过程产生。 It's only spawned now by doing that baking process. 它被添加到这里的控制钻机资产中。 It's added in this Control Rig asset here. 现在你可以看到我们进入了动画模式。 And now you can see we're in animation mode. 在这里，如果你有任何姿势，可以从姿势库中选择。 So from here, if you have any poses, you can select those from your pose library. 我们在 Anim Outliner 中看到了主要控件的下拉列表、 We have the drop down of our main controls here in the Anim Outliner, 这是动画模式中的新功能。 which is new in animation mode. 你可以看到，这里还有一些 FK 和 IK 开关、 And you can see we also have some FK and IK switches here, 是可以切换的。 which are things you can toggle in and out. 它们将与 Sequencer 中的关键帧相对应。 They'll correspond with keyframes in Sequencer. 因此，你要确保不会在无意中切换。 So you want to make sure that that doesn't accidentally switch when you don't mean it to. 现在我们可以进行回放，动画效果与开始时非常相似。 And now we can play back and our animation is pretty similar to how it started. 而现在，你将无法一对一地了解它是如何出炉的了 And now you won't have a one to one relationship between how it was baked 和您的原始动画，而不会在这里进行过于细化的处理。 and your original animation without getting too granular here. 这取决于图形反向求解的准确性。 This depends on the accuracy of the backwards solve of your graph. 因此，这就是影响 "控制钻机 "精确度的原因。 So that is what is affecting how accurately the Control Rig is baked down. 但在这里，我们可以修改关键帧。 But from here, we can modify our keyframes. 如果你想做一些小改动、 And if you want to make small modifications, 你可以转到这个加号部分区域，创建一个添加轨迹。 you can go to this plus section area and create an additive track. 无论你的时间指示器在哪里，它都会从哪里开始。 This is going to start wherever your time indicator is. 因此，你只需将其拖过零帧即可。 So you'll just want to drag this past frame zero. 确保我们的抢拍功能已打开。 Let's make sure our snapping is turned on. 假设我只想改变这只手的高度。 And let's say I just wanted to change the height of this hand. 我会在开始时创建一个关键帧。 I would create a keyframe at the start. 因此，让我们在这里创建一个关键帧，提前拖动这个关键帧。 So let's create a keyframe here, drag this earlier. 我将复制这个关键帧，稍后再擦除，然后再次粘贴。 And I'm going to copy that, scrub until later, and then paste that keyframe again. 所以，我们只是从零开始。 So we're just going from zero to zero here. 但比方说，在中间，我想在 Z 中提出这个问题。 But let's say in the middle, I wanted to raise this in Z. 因此，我只需点击 Control 键和 tilde 键，就能从组件空间切换到世界空间。 So I'll just hit Control and tilde to swap from the component space into world space. 你可以看到，我其实是想把它拖上来、 And you can see here, I actually try to drag this up, 这样做的结果非常令人不快。 and it creates a pretty unpleasing result. 其实就是抓住这个控制器、 By actually just grabbing this controller, 我们要把她的胳膊弄断，因为我们要转移地点。 we're breaking her arm because we're moving the location. 但很多时候，这些都是由旋转驱动的 But a lot of times, these are driven by the rotation 而不是移动手。 of our different lower arm controls rather than moving the hand. 所以，我其实只想把它删掉。 So I actually just want to delete that. 如果我创建一个下臂关键帧、 And if I create a lower arm keyframe, 因此，我将沿用之前的做法，将其移动到 72，之后再移动到 180。 so I'll do the same thing I did earlier, move that to 72 and something like 180 later on. 而在中间，我们只需改变这里的旋转，将手向上旋转。 And in the middle, we just change the rotation here and rotate the hand up. 我们会开始发现，这只是为了证明它在起作用，而不是为了做出漂亮的东西。 We'll start to see this is just to show that it's working, not to make something beautiful. 不过，是的，你很快就能看出来。 But yeah, you can see that very quickly. 我们在轨道上添加了一个非常简单的添加动画。 We added a really simple additive animation to our track. 希望你能明白，在这个过程的基础上，你可以很容易地进行推断 And hopefully, you can see how you can extrapolate on top of this process pretty easily 添加一些简单的添加动画，以真正调整角色动画。 to add some simple additive animation to really dial in your character animation. 有一点需要注意，因为我们已经创建了添加轨道、 One thing to note, since we've created that additive track, 现在我们每次选择一个钻机，它就会捕捉到我们的添加轨迹。 every time we select a rig now, it'll snap to our additive track. 但有时，你只想做一个小小的添加修改 But sometimes, you just want to make that one small additive modification 手或脚等部位，以调整它们的位置。 to something like the hand or the feet to realign them. 但实际上，你要调整的是 Sequencer 中较高位置的原始关键帧。 But you want to actually adjust the original keyframes that are higher up in Sequencer. 因此，我们有最初的绝对轨道，下面是我们的添加轨道。 So we have our original absolute track and below we have our additive track. 因此，如果我们右键单击这个添加轨迹，你会看到关键部分被选中为 true。 So if we right click on this additive track, you'll see key this section is checked to true. 如果取消选中此项，现在当我们选择任何控件时、 If you just uncheck this, now when we select any control, 就会弹出第一个绝对图中的原始动画，而不是添加轨迹、 it'll pop up to our original animation in our first absolute graph instead of the additive track, 这可以帮助他们更加井井有条。 which can help these stay a lot more organized. 现在，出于某种原因，你会想，这很酷，但我喜欢原来的动画、 Now, for some reason, you're like, this is cool, but I liked the original animations, 特别是因为如果控制装置设置得不够完美、 especially because if the control rig is not set up perfectly, 你会发现动画和烘焙的控制装备版本之间存在很大差异。 you will see a pretty big discrepancy between the animation and the baked control rig version. 因此，如果你想删除你的控制装备，真的不用担心。 So if you ever want to delete your control rig, there's really nothing to fear here. 只需点击此处控制钻机的父母，即最高选项、 Just click on the parents of the control rig here, the highest option, 然后按下删除键，就能删除轨道上的所有内容。 and just press delete and that will delete everything from the track. 我们要做的就是重新选择动画，确保它们都被选中、 And all we have to do is reselect our animations, make sure they're all selected here, 然后右键单击，转到属性，再转到处于活动状态。 and right click, go to properties, and then go to is active. 因此，在烘烤时，这些都会被关闭。 So these are turned off when you bake that out. 但现在你可以看到，我们已经完全恢复了原始动画，没有了控制装备。 But now you can see we have our original animation completely restored without control rig.
items.speaker: instructor
